schema.description: E-commerce server providing product catalog management, shopping cart operations, and user authentication for the Fake Store API.

tools.name: get_all_products
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all products from the fake store catalog with optional result limiting and sorting.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (pagination limit).

sort.description: Sort order for results; use 'asc' for ascending or 'desc' for descending.

products.description: List of product objects matching the query criteria.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product.

title.description: The display name of the product.

price.description: The monetary value of the product in USD.

description.description: Detailed textual description of the product.

category.description: The product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

image.description: URL pointing to the product image asset.

rating.description: Customer rating statistics for the product.

rate.description: Average customer rating score on a 0-5 scale.

count.description: Total number of customer ratings submitted.

tools.name: get_product_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific product using its unique identifier.

product_id.description: The unique identifier of the product to retrieve.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product.

title.description: The display name of the product.

price.description: The monetary value of the product in USD.

description.description: Detailed textual description of the product.

category.description: The product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

image.description: URL pointing to the product image asset.

rating.description: Customer rating statistics for the product.

rate.description: Average customer rating score on a 0-5 scale.

count.description: Total number of customer ratings submitted.

tools.name: get_products_by_category
tools.description: Retrieve all products belonging to a specific category classification.

category.description: The product category classification to filter by (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

products.description: List of products within the specified category.

id.description: The unique identifier of the product.

title.description: The display name of the product.

price.description: The monetary value of the product in USD.

description.description: Detailed textual description of the product.

category.description: The product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

image.description: URL pointing to the product image asset.

rating.description: Customer rating statistics for the product.

rate.description: Average customer rating score on a 0-5 scale.

count.description: Total number of customer ratings submitted.

tools.name: get_all_categories
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all available product category classifications in the store.

categories.description: List of available product category names.

items.description: Product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a new product entry in the fake store (returns mock creation response).

title.description: The display name of the product.

price.description: The monetary value of the product in USD.

description.description: Detailed textual description of the product.

category.description: The product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

image.description: URL pointing to the product image asset.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the new product.

title.description: The display name of the product.

price.description: The monetary value of the product in USD.

description.description: Detailed textual description of the product.

category.description: The product category classification (e.g., electronics, jewelery, men's clothing, women's clothing).

image.description: URL pointing to the product image asset.

tools.name: get_all_carts
tools.description: Retrieve all shopping carts from the system with optional pagination and sorting.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (pagination limit).

sort.description: Sort order for results; use 'asc' for ascending or 'desc' for descending.

id.description: The unique identifier of the shopping cart.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user account associated with this cart.

date.description: Cart creation or modification date in ISO 8601 format.

products.description: List of items contained in the cart.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product in the cart.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

tools.name: get_user_cart
tools.description: Retrieve the shopping cart associated with a specific user account.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user account whose cart should be retrieved.

id.description: The unique identifier of the shopping cart.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user account associated with this cart.

date.description: Cart creation or modification date in ISO 8601 format.

products.description: List of items contained in the cart.

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product in the cart.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

tools.name: user_login
tools.description: Authenticate user credentials and retrieve an access token for authorized operations.

token.description: JWT access token for authenticated API requests.
